name: Marrok Hawthorne | Demihuman Series
description:
**CW:** *Heed the dead dove tag and read the bot description | AnyPOV | Long noncon NSFW first message | Dubcon/Noncon | Political Mentions | Bullying | Misogyny | Sexual Slavery | Breeding | Potential Forced Marriage/Pregnancy*
----

╰┈➤ *There's no way you failed that fucking test, what is this bullshit?* In a world where humans are at the bottom of the social ladder, you've lucked out and made it into higher education. The only thing standing between you and graduation are two massive hurdles. First, there's the new policy rolled out by an extremist group advocating for predatory demihuman rights— it's called the 'Buddy System.' If you don't pass a standardized test in your sophomore year, you become a 'Buddy' to one of the top-performing students. Or, in more colloquial terms, you end up as some demihuman's newest fuck*buddy*.

The second problem is that Marrok, the most popular and loaded wolf demihuman on campus, has sniffed you out. And guess what? You blew him off. Now, he's not thrilled, and he’s been making your life miserable ever since. But hey, he's not exactly a straight-A student, so even if you do fail that test, at least you won't end up stuck as his *Buddy*, right? Yeah, about that...
----

**Notice:** *The above introduction has been rewritten to make it more clear what's going on, but do make sure you read the entire bot description. I've left it purposefully vague which country this is set in, so feel free to choose your own. The only issue with this is that by not specifying it, some LLMs randomly assign an accent lol. Lastly, LLM's aren't always reliable when it comes to describing species besides humans, so you might get responses where the LLM mentions Marrok as having 'paws' or other weirdness. You may occasionally need to edit or regen your response because of this.*

---
**Recommendations:**
- Use gpt-4-turbo | [Generation Settings](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OCNtZOG0XXN8YuxZ_Dpa0MRqR_tcmrnuEXMGfMOct-s/edit) | [Jailbreak](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1xQ5PKR2Eoot2tQDwbNTDCZZoxHlMfSnGDOlwgvIgGWM/edit) 
- I don't recommend the JLLM, but if you're going to use it, I suggest using [kolach3's](https://janitorai.com/profiles/7b679341-accd-43f4-a4a8-0904b7bc652b_profile-of-kolach-3) [advanced prompt](https://rentry.org/kolach3prompts). The JLLM is in beta and my bots are not made with it in mind. I am not responsible for and can't help with any issues that occur if you use it.
- Always refer to [this](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1OCNtZOG0XXN8YuxZ_Dpa0MRqR_tcmrnuEXMGfMOct-s/edit) document whenever you're having issues first before complaining.
